name: Siddh Chakra
shortDescription: Sacred worship of the Navpad honoring the supreme Siddhas
fullDescription: Siddh Chakra Puja is an immensely powerful and auspicious Jain ritual dedicated to the supreme Siddhas and the Navpad. Accompanied by devotional music and intricate stutis, this ceremony brings immense peace, prosperity, and spiritual upliftment to the devotees.
significance: Worshipping the Siddh Chakra destroys karmic bondages and paves the way for ultimate liberation (Moksha) while bringing joy and wellness to the community.

name: 108 Parshwanath
shortDescription: Divine reverence to the 108 majestic forms of Lord Parshwanath
fullDescription: The 108 Parshwanath Puja is a grand spiritual event celebrating the 108 renowned Tirths (pilgrimage sites) and forms of the 23rd Tirthankara, Lord Parshwanath. Shrey guides the devotees through soulful musical renditions of the glorious names and miracles of Prabhu Parshwanath.
significance: Invokes the protective and miraculous blessings of Lord Parshwanath, known to eradicate obstacles and bring harmony.

name: Sakrastav Maha Abhishek
shortDescription: Grand celestial bathing ceremony accompanied by the sacred Sakrastav
fullDescription: This magnificent ceremony replicates the grand abhishek performed by Indra (Sakra) accompanied by the chanting of the powerful Sakrastav Stotra. Shrey elevates this ritual with classical devotion, creating an atmosphere that mirrors the heavenly coronation of the Tirthankara.
significance: The recitation of Sakrastav while performing the supreme Abhishek purifies the soul and honors the ultimate virtues of the Arihants.

name: Shri Shetrunjay Bhav Yatra
shortDescription: A soul-stirring musical pilgrimage to the eternal Mount Shatrunjaya
fullDescription: Experience the divine journey to the eternal Tirth, Mount Shatrunjaya, from wherever you are. Through deeply emotional and vividly descriptive Bhakti Sangeet, Shrey takes the devotees on a 'Bhav Yatra' (mental/spiritual pilgrimage), passing through the sacred tuks and arriving at the divine feet of Lord Adinath.
significance: Participating in a Bhav Yatra earns the same spiritual merit as a physical pilgrimage, instilling deep devotion and detachment.

name: Diksha Mahotsav
shortDescription: Joyous and emotional musical elevation for the path of renunciation
fullDescription: A Diksha Mahotsav marks the monumental step of a soul renouncing worldly attachments to walk the path of the Vitaragas. Shrey provides soul-stirring musical accompaniment for the Varshidaan, Biday, and main Diksha ceremonies, blending immense joy with deep spiritual emotion (Vairagya).
significance: Celebrates the supreme spiritual heroism of the Mumukshu, inspiring others toward the path of liberation.

name: Tap Vadhamna and Sanji
shortDescription: Vibrant musical celebrations honoring the supreme ascetics and tapasvis
fullDescription: Accomplishing a grueling Jain fast (Tap) is a victory of the soul over the body. The Tap Vadhamna and Sanji are joyous musical nights dedicated to glorifying this spiritual achievement. Shrey brings energetic and deeply devotional music to celebrate the willpower and purity of the Tapasvis.
significance: Glorifying asceticism (Tap) multiplies spiritual merit (Anumodana) and encourages the entire community to practice austerities.

name: Anchoring and Sanvedna
shortDescription: Professional hosting and deeply emotional scriptual narration (Sanvedna)
fullDescription: Beyond singing, Shrey offers expert anchoring and master of ceremonies services for all scale Jain events. Furthermore, he excels in 'Sanvedna'—the art of deeply emotional, spoken word narration that touches the hearts of the audience, bringing tears of devotion to their eyes.
significance: Ensures the smooth, professional flow of the event while keeping the audience spiritually engaged and emotionally connected.

name: Ratri Bhavna and Jain Garba
shortDescription: Uplifting evening devotion and traditional Jain Raas/Garba
fullDescription: Spiritual joy finds its expression through music and dance in Ratri Bhavna and Jain Garba. Shrey leads the community in vibrant, rhythmic, and purely devotional Jain Garba, ensuring the atmosphere remains sacred, joyous, and focused on the Paramatma.
significance: Transforms social gatherings into platforms for collective devotion, promoting harmony and religious enthusiasm among youth and elders alike.

name: All Types of Jain Programmes
shortDescription: Customized devotional singing and hosting for any Jain religious occasion
fullDescription: Whether it is an intimate family religious gathering, an Anjan Shalaka, a Pratishtha Mahotsav, or a vast community event, Shrey offers tailored musical and spiritual services to suit the specific needs of any traditional Jain program.
significance: Ensures that every spiritual milestone in the community is accompanied by the highest quality of Jain devotion and musical reverence.
whatsIncluded: Adaptable to all Jinalaya and community events
